zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri II de Sully於大約1224年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易時，他的父親Henri De Quieret I31歲，母親Hélia De Doullens19歲。他於1252年12月與Pétronille DE JOIGNY結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1269年8月22日在義大利阿布盧左利阿吉拉塔格利亞可左享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri II de Sully于大约1224年出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易时，他的父亲Henri De Quieret I31岁，母亲Hélia De Doullens19岁。他于1252年12月与Pétronille DE JOIGNY结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1269年8月22日在意大利阿布盧左利阿吉拉塔格利亞可左享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri II de Sully was born about 1224, in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, his father, Henri De Quieret I, was 31 and his mother, Hélia De Doullens, was 19. He married Pétronille DE JOIGNY in December 1252. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 August 1269, in Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italy, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri II de Sully est né environ 1224, à Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Henri De Quieret I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hélia De Doullens, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Pétronille DE JOIGNY en décembre 1252. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 août 1269, à Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italie, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri II de Sully um 1224 in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri De Quieret I 31 und seine Mutter Hélia De Doullens 19. Er hat im Dezember 1252 Pétronille DE JOIGNY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. August 1269 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Italien.

ko.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Henri II de Sully(이)가 대략 1224년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri De Quieret I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélia De Doullens(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1252년 12월 Pétronille DE JOIGNY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1269년 8월 22일 이탈리아 아브루즈오 '아키라 타그리악즈오에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri II de Sully nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Henri De Quieret I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hélia De Doullens, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Pétronille DE JOIGNY em dezembro de 1252. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1269, em Tagliacozzo, L'Aquila, Abruzzo, Itália, com 46 anos.

ru.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri II de Sully родился около 1224 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri De Quieret I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hélia De Doullens, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Pétronille DE JOIGNY декабрь 1252 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 августа 1269 г. в местности таглякоззо, л'акуила, абруззо, Италия в возрасте 46 лет.
